# Phobos

The larger and closer of the two small moons that orbit Mars. It completes
an orbit in under eight hours, faster than Mars itself rotates.

## Observations

- [fact] Phobos orbits Mars in about seven hours and thirty-nine minutes #orbit
- [fact] Phobos is gradually spiraling closer to Mars over geologic time (tidal deceleration)

## Relations

- relates_to [[Companion Planting and Pollinators]]
